violations.description: General equipment and utensils - Maintenance and operation. — --Nonfood contact equipment was not maintained in a good repair or sound condition. -Walk-in freezer with ice build up.
Single-service and single-use articles. — --Single-service item was not stored in a proper location to be protected from contamination. -At time of inspection boxes stored on floor of back room
Handwashing lavatories. — --Handwashing lavatory was not provided in sufficient number and/or not accessible to allow convenient use by employees. -Sanitation bucket in handwash sink

Cleaning and maintenance of floors, walls and ceilings. — --Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc…) were not clean or not cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. -Walk-in cooler floor in need of cleaning.
Cleaning frequency, maintained clean (2 pts deducted)
